[DQC.US.0166.10090] A value of 19,350,000 was reported for the concept us-gaap:IncomeTaxPaidStateAndLocalAfterRefundReceived. This value has dimensions of us-gaap:IncomeTaxAuthorityAxis=us-gaap:StateAndLocalTaxJurisdictionOtherMember but this fact is not included in a dimensional table ( hypercube). All dimensional facts should be included in a hypercube.
The properties of this us-gaap:IncomeTaxPaidStateAndLocalAfterRefundReceived fact are:
